info.name: Operator Fleet Analytics — 3 Fleet Owners × 3 Vehicles
info.description: Self-contained integration test for operator-level fleet dashboard analytics. Creates an operator person via fleet v2 login, promotes to OPERATOR role, seeds 3 fleet owners with 3 vehicles each across 3 dates, and verifies EARNINGS, FILTERED, and paginated vehicle list stats.
